title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Jordan Topoleski moderates a panel with engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discussing AI coding adoption at scale. Topics include workflow changes, productivity measurement, and the impact of AI on software development lifecycle stages. Key insights include small teams shipping nine-month roadmaps in one month and engineers spending 85% of time on non-coding tasks.
